description: Create pLDDT confidence plot with domain architecture showing UBAC2 structure confidence and absence of catalytic site
code:
import requests
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

# Re-fetch PDB for plotting
url = "https://alphafold.ebi.ac.uk/files/AF-Q8NBM4-F1-model_v6.pdb"
resp = requests.get(url)
pdb_text = resp.text

# Parse pLDDT from B-factor
plddt_by_res = {}
for line in pdb_text.split('\n'):
    if line.startswith('ATOM') and line[12:16].strip() == 'CA':
        res_num = int(line[22:26].strip())
        bfactor = float(line[60:66].strip())
        plddt_by_res[res_num] = bfactor

residues = sorted(plddt_by_res.keys())
plddt_values = [plddt_by_res[r] for r in residues]

# Create pLDDT plot with domain annotations
fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(14, 5))

# Plot pLDDT
ax.plot(residues, plddt_values, color='#1565C0', linewidth=1, alpha=0.8)
ax.fill_between(residues, plddt_values, alpha=0.15, color='#1565C0')

# Color by confidence
for r, p in zip(residues, plddt_values):
    if p >= 90:
        color = '#0D47A1'
    elif p >= 70:
        color = '#42A5F5'
    elif p >= 50:
        color = '#FFB74D'
    else:
        color = '#EF5350'
    ax.plot(r, p, 'o', color=color, markersize=1.5)

# Annotate domains
tm_regions = [(92, 112, 'TM1'), (126, 146, 'TM2'), (164, 184, 'TM3')]
for s, e, label in tm_regions:
    ax.axvspan(s, e, alpha=0.2, color='#4CAF50')
    ax.text((s+e)/2, 95, label, ha='center', fontsize=8, fontweight='bold', color='#2E7D32')

# UBA domain
ax.axvspan(304, 344, alpha=0.2, color='#9C27B0')
ax.text(324, 95, 'UBA', ha='center', fontsize=8, fontweight='bold', color='#6A1B9A')

# LIR motif
ax.axvspan(275, 278, alpha=0.3, color='#FFC107')
ax.text(276, 48, 'LIR', ha='center', fontsize=7, fontweight='bold', color='#F57F17')

# Where catalytic residues WOULD be (if active rhomboid)
ax.annotate('No catalytic\nGxSG in TMs', xy=(138, 30), fontsize=9, color='red', 
           fontweight='bold', ha='center',
           bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.3', facecolor='#FFCDD2', edgecolor='red', alpha=0.8))

# Confidence thresholds
ax.axhline(y=90, color='gray', linestyle='--', alpha=0.3, linewidth=0.5)
ax.axhline(y=70, color='gray', linestyle='--', alpha=0.3, linewidth=0.5)
ax.axhline(y=50, color='gray', linestyle='--', alpha=0.3, linewidth=0.5)

ax.text(348, 92, 'Very high', fontsize=7, color='#0D47A1', va='center')
ax.text(348, 72, 'Confident', fontsize=7, color='#42A5F5', va='center')
ax.text(348, 52, 'Low', fontsize=7, color='#FFB74D', va='center')

ax.set_xlabel('Residue Position', fontsize=11)
ax.set_ylabel('AlphaFold pLDDT Score', fontsize=11)
ax.set_title('UBAC2 (Q8NBM4) AlphaFold Confidence & Domain Architecture\nRhomboid pseudoprotease — no catalytic site', fontsize=12, fontweight='bold')
ax.set_xlim(1, 355)
ax.set_ylim(20, 100)

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('ubac2_plddt_domains.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("pLDDT domain plot saved.")
